sections.paragraph:
ἀναφέρω [ἀνά, φέρω; ‘bring, carry up’]

—1. lead, take up, in sense of assuming leadership for a journey Mt 17:1 = Mk 9:2; take up pass. in sense of being moved from a lower to a higher locality Lk 24:51.

—2. offer up, cultic t.t. involving perception of an elevated site for the offering Hb 7:27; 13:15; 1 Pt 2:5; Js 2:21.

—3. ‘take on oneself a burden’, bear, sustain sins Hb 9:28 (see Isaiah 53:12).
